summary: Full E2E testing of TESS AI passed. Backend: 11/11 pytest cases green (health, subject detection, chat text-only, chat with public PDF (usedPdf:true), chat with 404 PDF (graceful skip), chat with base64 image). Frontend: Auth screen renders with TESS AI brand + Sign In/Sign Up tabs + email/password + Google button; sign-up with a fresh Firebase user succeeded; Onboarding shows Teacher/Student cards; selecting Student revealed class chips 6-12; selecting class 9 + Continue landed on Chat; sidebar visible on wide viewport, hamburger toggles it, New Chat button, empty state with 3 suggested prompts, floating input bar with camera/mic/send icons, hallucinate notice visible; sending a text message added a grey user bubble on the right and an AI reply block on the left with thumbs up/down + speaker icons; thumbs-up click persisted (feedback write to Firestore succeeded, no console errors).

minor.issue: Keyword map iteration order can misclassify chemistry/physics/biology as 'science' (science entry lists 'chem','phy','bio' first). Contract still returns a non-null subject, but subject-specific PDF lookup for students may resolve to a generic 'science' book instead of the specific subject file requested (school_textbooks/class_X/science.pdf vs chemistry.pdf).

action_items: (Optional) Re-order SUBJECT_KEYWORDS so specific subjects (physics, chemistry, biology) are matched before the umbrella 'science' entry, or drop 'chem/phy/bio' aliases from 'science'.
(Optional) chat.tsx is ~720 lines; consider splitting Sidebar and MessageBubble into separate files under src/components/ for maintainability.
critical_code_review_comments: chat.tsx exceeds the 700-line guideline (720 lines). Sidebar and MessageBubble components are good candidates for extraction.
Backend correctly excludes Mongo _id (no _id usage), uses env vars, proper /api prefix, CORS enabled, HTTPException with meaningful details, temp files cleaned up in finally.
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL, all interactive elements have testID, all text wrapped in <Text>, StyleSheet.create used, KeyboardAvoidingView present on auth + chat.
seed_data_creation: Created a fresh Firebase user tess.tester+<ts>@example.com / TessTest#2026 via the Sign Up tab and a Firestore user profile (role=student, currentClass=9), plus one chat session/message with thumbs-up feedback.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://tess-smart-tutor.preview.emergentagent.com. Run: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=... pytest /app/backend/tests/test_tess_backend.py -v. Firebase project 'teslcrum' is live; each frontend E2E must create a fresh unique email via Sign Up. Chat feedback writes to Firestore under users/{uid}/sessions/{sid}/messages/{mid}.feedback.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no failures. Minor detect-subject ordering nuance noted for optional polish.
